metadata.description: Baidu AI Studio LLM API skills for calling ERNIE, DeepSeek, Kimi and other large language models

plugins.name: baidu-aistudio-llm-api
plugins.description: Baidu AI Studio LLM API calling assistant. Helps developers quickly integrate ERNIE, DeepSeek, Kimi and other LLM services from AI Studio. Compatible with OpenAI SDK, 1 million free tokens on registration.
